arts.ttl: New Man City case timeline emerges amid 115 charges verdict delay and Arsenal wait
arts.sum: The outcome of Manchester City's legal battle against the Premier League over sponsorship rules will not be reached until 2026, a new report has claimed. In the meantime, a verdict from their other legal case against the Premier League is expected soon.

arts.ttl: Arsenal youngster signs second new contract in 12 months and will link up with first team
arts.sum: Highly-rated teenage goalkeeper Alexei Rojas has agreed fresh terms and will hope to state case for role in senior squad

arts.ttl: Talks with Crystal Palace in ‘next few days’ for Oliver Glasner – Eagles manager on top of club’s list
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has been linked to RB Leipzig before they sacked Marco Rose on March 30th. These claims have intensified since then and this week’s edition of SportBild provides the latest. The Bundesliga club have the Crystal Palace manager and Como’s Cesc Fàbregas on top of their list. Leipzig and Red Bull The post Talks with Crystal Palace in ‘next few days’ for Oliver Glasner – Eagles manager on top of club’s list appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'prepared' to pay 'in excess of £103m' for Arsenal superstar who could replace 24-year-old
arts.sum: Real Madrid are allegedly willing to pay in excess of £103m in order to sign Arsenal attacker Bukayo Saka during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: 10 players set to miss Arsenal vs Crystal Palace as Mikel Arteta faces tense PSG injury wait
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has seen injuries plague his squad for much of the campaign with the long-awaited return of Bukayo Saka arriving in the same clash that ended up being Gabriel Magalhaes ' final of the season. While Saka has been cleared fit to play, Arteta has ruled Jorginho and Riccardo Calafiori out of the London derby with it possible the former does not return this season .
